scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:frontend && npm run lint:fix:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.docker:restart: npm run docker:down && npm run docker:up
scripts.clean: npm run clean:frontend && npm run clean:backend
scripts.clean:frontend: cd frontend && rmdir /s /q node_modules dist .angular 2>nul || echo Cleaned
scripts.clean:backend: cd backend && rmdir /s /q node_modules dist 2>nul || echo Cleaned
